justification: All pass criteria met: (1) All three input sources represented — Bird's domain rules, MJ's architecture, and Pippen's operational notes are clearly synthesized. (2) All 3 ACs present with exact values ($4.50, $5.00, $0.01). (3) Pippen's operational notes explicitly included — JSDoc requirement is an explicit architecture decision (not optional), high-traffic context noted (500 req/sec), unit tests only specified. (4) $0.01 floor labeled as a domain invariant in both domain_rules and terminology_alignment. (5) Quantity boundary >= 10 preserved exactly in domain_rules with testable assertions.

observations.text: JSDoc requirement elevated to an architecture_guidance decision with clear implementation_note referencing Pippen — treated as mandatory, not optional
AC3 (price floor) fully preserved with exact $0.01 value and correct edge case description
Quantity boundary preserved exactly as >= 10 with testable assertions showing 9 vs 10 boundary
terminology_alignment section explicitly labels price floor as a domain invariant
High-traffic context (500 req/sec) carried through from Pippen's operational notes into task_context and architecture_guidance
No invented information — contradictions_resolved and open_questions are empty, assumptions are reasonable
